MinimalKit
Features Pricing Docs Get Started

Build faster, ship cleaner

A lightweight UI component library for modern web apps. Zero-config, tree-shakeable, and built for speed.

Get Started Free View Components 
npm install minimalkit
import { Button, Card } from 'minimalkit'

Everything you need

50+ components, zero-config, tree-shakeable

⚡

Lightning Fast

Sub-millisecond build times with zero runtime overhead.

🎨

Fully Customizable

Design tokens, themes, and variants for every component.

♿

Accessible

WCAG 2.2 compliant out of the box. Keyboard, screen reader, and touch ready.

📦

Tree-Shakeable

Only ship what you use. Zero dead code in production.

🔧

Framework Agnostic

Works with React, Vue, Svelte, Solid, or plain HTML.

📱

Responsive

Mobile-first design with fluid typography and breakpoint system.

Simple, transparent pricing

Start free, upgrade when you need more
